name: fix-gemfile-platform-mismatch
description: Fix Gemfile.lock platform mismatch when CI runs on Linux but lock file was generated on Windows
error: Bundler::GemNotFound: Could not find gem 'x64-mingw-ucrt' in the Gems list
when_to_use: When you see Bundler::GemNotFound errors about missing x64-mingw-ucrt platform, or when CI fails because Gemfile.lock has Windows platform but server runs Linux
